report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Fair Token Launch Mechanisms Guide 2026 and PEAQ & DePIN Robotics Guide 2026 — covering emerging crypto narratives not yet on the site

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified 'fair token launches' and 'crypto robotics/DePIN' as two high-potential content gaps across 517 published pages
Fair launches trending in 2026 narratives (CoinGecko, a16z, Kerberus) — bonding curves, anti-sniper, meme launchpads 2.0
PEAQ/DePIN robotics emerging as new narrative with Trump admin robotics push, $8B+ annual VC inflows, and PEAQ at 2M+ connected devices
Cross-referenced existing content: best-meme-coin-launchpads-2026 exists but no fair-launch mechanisms guide; ai-depin-crypto-guide exists but only a passing mention of robotics/PEAQ
Both topics have strong search intent: 'fair token launch' informational queries, 'PEAQ crypto' and 'DePIN guide' rising interest

sections.title: Content Created
items: Fair Token Launch Mechanisms Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 12 min read, 9 content sections + FAQ, covering bonding curves, anti-sniper protection, meme launchpads 2.0, reputation systems, evaluation checklist

PEAQ & DePIN Robotics Guide 2026 — ~3,000 words, 11 min read, 9 content sections + FAQ, covering machine economy, PEAQ network deep dive, robotics x crypto convergence, tokenomics, getting started guide

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: fair-token-launches: title 'Fair Token Launch Mechanisms Guide 2026 | degen0x' (54 chars), 10 keywords, Article + FAQ schema, 6 FAQs, 5 internal links
peaq-depin-robotics: title 'PEAQ & DePIN Robotics Guide 2026 | degen0x' (46 chars), 10 keywords, Article + FAQ schema, 6 FAQs, 5 internal links
Both pages: OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, Twitter cards, dynamic OG images via /api/og endpoint
Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: no errors in new files (pre-existing @types/web conflicts unrelated)
Both pages follow exact template pattern from chain-abstraction-guide-2026
No interactive components needed — both are informational guides
